2604.25733.title: Verification of Neural Networks (Lecture Notes)
2604.25733.paper_summary: These lecture notes provide an introduction to the verification of neural networks from a theoretical perspective. We discuss feed-forward neural networks, recurrent neural networks, attention mechanisms, and transformers, together with specification languages and algorithmic verification techniques.
2604.25733.paper_summary_zh: 這些講義提供了從理論角度驗證神經網絡的介紹。<lb/>我們討論了前饋神經網絡、遞歸神經網絡、注意力機制和Transformer，以及規範語言和算法驗證技術。
2604.25733.author: Benedikt Bollig et.al.
